title: AutoSow by Neni-o [Light QoL for Farm]
description: Automatically harvests and replants fully grown crops when right-clicked with the corresponding item.
body:
![baner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/16d3c7824792fd7a88874f3e07090436bf7d86fd.png)
## 🌱 AutoSow – Auto Harvest & Replant

**Tired of planting seeds over and over?** 🌾
AutoSow is a lightweight Forge mod for **Minecraft 1.21.x** that lets you **right-click** fully grown crops to **harvest and replant instantly**!
Also supports **dispenser automation** for many plants 🤖

---

### ✨ Features

* 🌾 **Supported plants:** Wheat, Carrots, Potatoes, Beetroots, Torchflower, Nether Wart, Cocoa Beans, Melons 🍉, Pumpkins 🎃, Sweet Berries 🍇
* ⚙ **Configurable** – enable/disable per crop, toggle seed consumption, and more
* 🤖 **Dispenser support** – use dispenser(with shears) to harvest melons, pumpkins and sweet berries
* 🪓 Works with empty hand or correct planting item
* 🎯 Special handling:

  * Melons → slices or whole blocks (config)
  * Pumpkins → always whole blocks
  * Sweet Berries → harvest based on growth stage

---

💡 Perfect for **large farms**, **automation setups**, and **resource-focused survival bases**.

🤝 Looking for more QoL mods for farmers? Pair it with [Farmland Water - Walk Water by Fields](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmland-water) to streamline your entire farming setup and [Stack Manager](https://modrinth.com/mod/stack-manager) for per-item stack caps (up to 99) on seeds, crops, and potions, keeping your barns and backpacks tidy.[Farmer Enchants](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmer-enchants) for hoe enchants and better experience while farming.

📂 Config file: `autosow-common.toml` *(generated on first run)*
